title: rubus × hemi-idaeus
intro: Rubus × hemi-idaeus, also known as the Raspberry-Rose or Rosa-Raspberry hybrid, is a cross between the Fragaria iidaiana and the Rubus idaeus, resulting in a unique plant with characteristics of both parent species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × hemi-idaeus are attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and anthocyanins, which can help protect against cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and support immune system health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × hemi-idaeus can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary products.
